name: food_desertion
description: Direction A PR 6: workers eat 1 food per day at the day boundary. If food can't cover the lair, the deficit deserts (queue_free). Setup: Economy.food=3 (instead of 50), 2 workers. Advance 5 days via Clock.advance_hours(120). Day 1: 3-2=1. Day 2: deficit=1, food=0, 1 worker deserts. Day 3+: 1 worker × 1 food/day. After 5 days food still 0, 1 worker should still be alive (the 2nd day's deficit ate the second worker; after that the 1 remaining is fed by 0 food → another deserts day 3 → 0 alive).
